Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0200 "COBRA-8C00-0200" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $8c00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Cobra.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $8C00 which: 1. Turns off interrupts from the two CIA chips and acks any pending CIA interrupts 2. Copies 512 bytes of data from $8C30 to $0200 where it was after the original game had loaded 3. And finally jumps to the start of the game at $0200 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code)
Note: the space used at $8C00 in the original dump contained some unused data and code, so it was safe to overwrite.
